basic_details.job_title: IIM Kozhikode Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Management Kozhikode (IIM Kozhikode)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management Kozhikode (IIM Kozhikode) has released an official notification for the recruitment of Research Associate Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Online through the official IIM Kozhikode website. The last date to submit the application form is 05-06-2026.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

qualification.education_qualification: Post-Graduation in Mathematics from a leading National Institute with experience in networks, graph theory, and/or random matrix theory.
qualification.details: Research Associate: Post-Graduation in Mathematics from a leading National Institute. Experience in working with networks, graph theory, and or random matrix theory.

selection_process: Shortlisting based on application details Interview (through video conference for shortlisted candidates)
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIM Kozhikode Research Associate Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 05-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Kozhikode to complete the application.
